posts.body: The Pour Market is Rock Hill's most Historic Date Night Spot. Choose from over 50+ wines and some great food and enjoy dining in a historic setting.

We are proud to announce that we has been nominated for Best of South Carolina!

This recognition means so much to our team, and it wouldn’t be possible without the incredible support from our community. Thank you for being part of our journey
stay tuned for more updates, and we appreciate every vote and every visit! Thank you Rock Hill. 💛

🎤 Comedy Night at The Pour Market 😂
Get ready to laugh the night away at The Pour Market!
Join us on Saturday, May 16, 2026 at 8PM for a night of live comedy, great vibes, and community fun at The Pour Market in the UC Area.
✨ Featuring local and regional comedians
🍻 Drinks, food, and plenty of laughs
🚗 Free Parking Available
Bring your friends, grab a seat, and enjoy an unforgettable night in one of Rock Hill’s most exciting destinations.
Laugh loud. Stay late. Experience The Pour Market.

reviews_data.review_text: Food was very good! Loved the made in house bread. Brussels were delicious. Waitstaff was friendly and attentive. I’m going back 😃

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Amanda for a great review. See you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: We just went for lunch. The homemade focaccia bread is seriously so delicious. Go check this place out.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Keisha we loved having our teams at our place. See you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: We have been here twice with our basketball crew and it has been amazing both times! Amazing place for big groups and so accommodating!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Anthony thanks for all these stars and so glad you enjoyed your time with us. See you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Didn't know what to expect because this appeared to be more of a taphouse. However, the food was so great. We really enjoyed our food and the service was awesome. We tried the pretzel and brussel sprouts and they were so delicious. Also tried one of the sandwiches and it had tons of great flavor. Must try!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Carol, thank you for those stars.

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free parking garage

reviews_data.review_text: Wanted something light, so went with the kids turkey and cheese sandwich with lemon arugula salad. Really good sourdough bread. It’s a busy little area, but there is free parking nearby in Deck A

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback—we’re really sorry to hear about your experience. We understand how frustrating it can be when ordering doesn’t go smoothly and when meals don’t arrive together.

We do offer traditional server service for guests who prefer not to order by phone, and we’re always happy to accommodate that to ensure a more seamless experience. Your feedback is helpful as we continue to improve both our ordering process and timing in the kitchen.

We appreciate you bringing this to our attention and hope you’ll give us another try so we can provide the experience you were expecting.

Thank you,
The Pour Market Team
reviews_data.review_text: Don’t like using phone to order. It didn’t take my food order but took beer order. Other 3 in party got their meals at different times and mine came after the mistake was realized and so they were all done before I got my sandwich. Preference server service

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Nathan thanks for all those stars.
reviews_data.review_text: Great place for a bite to eat or just hang out with a beer. Amazing staff and amazing space. The events they now have rolling out have been a great addition. Check them out!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Derra glad you had a great time. Can’t wait to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Really cool spot with great food and drinks. Nice outdoor and indoor seating. Dog friendly patio

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you for joining us for the comedy show we’re glad you had a great time overall and enjoyed the food, drinks, and performance. We will let Next Door Comedy show know about the acoustics for next time. 

Thanks again for coming out—we hope to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: We were there for the comedy show. Great show, terrible acoustics.. though we were off in the wing in front of the bar rather than in the main room with the stage up front. All in all a great show, drinks and food 😋 👌

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Kyle for all those stars and so glad you had a great time. See you soon again.
reviews_data.review_text: Nice variety of apps and sandwiches.  Excellent tap beer selection and many different cans and bottles available.  Had the Philly and chicken salad sandwich, both excellent!  Kristi gave us great service, including helping me order online.  Highly recommend Pour Market!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Liam for all those stars. Glad you had a great visit.
reviews_data.review_text: I absolutely love it here. The staff and owners are so welcoming and friendly. They have amazing food and great beers, but I come here for their people and atmosphere

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Stephen for the feedback. Would love to hear more about your experience can you reach out to us at connect@thepourmarket.com
reviews_data.review_text:
Food was good. They were short staffed so they did the best that they could.
Overall experience was ok but not sure I would go back

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Vanessa so glad you had a great experience. Thanks for all those stars. See you guys again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: My husband and I stopped in for a quick bite, he got the pork belly peach sandwich and I got the Sicilian hot sandwich. Both were incredible. All the food was excellent and they had a good draft selection. I highly recommend stopping in!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Olympus_Travel thank you for all those stars. I am so glad you were able to enjoy the space before the madness of the basketball teams from the event center.
reviews_data.review_text:
Stopped by on 3/22/25 around 4:00pm and had the place all too ourselves. Sat near the roll up door, and set up shop! The menue has tons of choices for handheld and salads and apps. We had a small hick up with the MozzLogs, but they re-fired them for us, no issues and the 2nd batch was outstanding
Definitely will come back for these time and time again. Both sandwiches are outrageously good. Quality and quantity worth it. The house style pub chips, also great@! Super cool building, easy parking in free garage, clean and welcoming!

I would suggest a change of hours. Maybe like 11 to 2 power hour with soup/sandwhich specials, close till 5 and re-open for that after work crowed! This place should be packed, especially in the summer!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Jason for a great review. See you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Unique sandwich choices for something different. Very good.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Marty for all those stars! Glad you had a good time
reviews_data.review_text: Great taphouse with a good selection of beers and wine.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Robert, so glad you and the wife enjoyed your time a The Pour Market. Can't wait to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: The wifey and I had lunch here. She ordered the crispy pork and peach sandwich. I had the philly cheese steak. Both were so delicious. The hostess from the "greatest Rugdy nation in the world" was a delight and super attentive. We were looking at the menu to decide what we were going to eat the next time we come.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Kevin for all those stars..glad you enjoyed your time with us. Look forward to seeing you agains soon.
reviews_data.review_text: The owners did a great job with the space! Awesome menu, cold beer, great service. The pork rinds and mozzalogs are amazing. If you’re in the area, come check out the Pour Market!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Trevor, Sorry for the experience you had, would love to  hear more on how we can get better. Please reach out to us at connect@thepourmarket.com
reviews_data.review_text:
Nice spot in Ft Mill… went in on a Saturday night for food and beers. Good selection of tap beers, pretty limited menu.

So there is no actual “service” in this place. You scan the qr code at your table and order on the toast app, and then they bring you stuff. Just, “here ya go” and that’s it. No asking if everything is ok, etc. We ordered beers and a couple flatbreads. Flatbreads were ok-ish. We had to get our own silverware and share plates. As we talked and munched we slowly decided what we’d order next but then the app was giving errors on trying to order more food. It was 9:02pm.  Got up and asked the bar - kitchen closed.  Had to leave and go somewhere else.

As in all things, communication is key. Would have been nice to know when the kitchen was closing.  Wouldn’t have expected a closed kitchen at 9pm on a Saturday night.

If they actually served their customers the place could be pretty cool.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Oh WOW Shawn, thank you for an amazing review. We are so glad you enjoyed your lunch with us. We look forward to serving you again soon.

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking, Free parking garage
review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text: I'm so glad a friend of mine posted this on Facebook because I would have not known it was there. This place was previously Middle James Brewing. It still has the brewery feel but has an awesome menu. I went at lunchtime! The focaccia caprese sandwich was fantastic. And that's coming from a New Yorker who has had some really good focaccia sandwiches! The focaccia is made in house and was delicious! I chose the sweet potato crisps which is a very very thinly sliced chip and I have never had sweet potato chips like that. They were so thin they melted in your mouth. Loved them! My employer got the peach jam and gruyere pork sandwich. The pork is basically bacon but it's more like pork belly bacon, very meaty and it had a smokey type flavor to it. It was very tasty, it had so many different flavors going on. He got their brussel sprouts as a side and I did taste those and they were delicious as well. I will definitely be back because there were plenty of other items on the menu that I am eager to try. I highly recommend this place. I also saw little posters in the bathroom advertising game nights, live music, football watch parties and drink specials etc...So be sure to follow them on social media to stay up to date with their events.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Katheryn! We really appreciate all the kind words.
reviews_data.review_text: Our first time at the Pour Market and definitely not our last. Our group of six meets at local restaurants each week and have sampled many wonderful meals. The food and service at the Pour Market ranks up there with some of our favorites. They make their own focaccia bread which takes their sandwiches over the top.  The sides are outstanding. The service was excellent (thank you Christy!) and the owner, Phil , checked in make sure we enjoyed the food. (We did!) Put this place on your radar! You won't regret it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Peggy, Thank you for great review and glad we were able to give you guys a great birthday celebration. See you again soon.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: My husband and I ate there for my his birthday. They had his favorite beer, Legions Juicy Jay. I had a Birdsong Jalapeno Beer. Our waitress, Nikki was delightful and did a great job explaining the menu. My husband went with the muffeletta sandwich with a side of the potato crisps. If you have not tried the potatoes crisps, well you are missing out. OMG, yummy! I ordered the Pesto Flatbread w/chicken. The flatbread pizza will keep me going back. The food was delicious and a great selection of beer and wine. We can't wait to go back when the pull-up garage doors are open and the fire pit is on. What a great location for the college kids at Winthrop in Rockhill. A fun hangout.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Neil for the great review.
reviews_data.review_text: Had a great cheese flatbread. The pork rinds were ok. Beer & service was great.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Clay thanks for the Great review. See you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Best service of all time, super clean and food was GREAT

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Aaron for the review. Hope your daughter did great!
reviews_data.review_text: Came here after my daughter’s volleyball tournament. The food and the service were amazing!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Ian, we are truly sorry for your experience, that is not what we strive for. We would like to make it up to you can you reach out to us at connect@thepourmarket.com.
reviews_data.review_text:
This is a place that maybe has some potential if you combine the inside and outside areas as a good hang out spot, but I wouldn't recommend it as a dinner spot, the food is okay but the staff of 2 wasn't bussing tables and there aren't alot of sit down tables to begin with.  I asked about getting a table cleaned off and waited 5 to 10 minutes and instead snagged a high top table that a couple vacated after just having drinks.

Atmosphere was definitely the best aspect if the Pour Market.  There was a live musician playing and he was good with good music at a good volume for how small it is in there.  The decor is really nice too, classic industrial with a nice little bar and a few tvs.  There is an outdoor area around a big gas firepit that looked really nice but it was cold out so I didn't see it up close.

Food was overall not bad, the flatbreads and Italian Salad were pretty good but they had no Italian dressing.  The pork rind appetizer was decent but you don't get much beer cheese dip with it.  The grilled pimento cheese sandwich was a miss, my wife who likes pimento cheese had to end up scraping off the cheese and just ate some if the bread.

For the bar section, the beer selection was good.  They serve a lot of wines as well, not sure about the liquor selection if any though...my back was to the bar so I didn't see.

The service was the main issue, I'm sure the staff of 2 was probably overwhelmed a bit but if you want bus the tables you have no place for people to sit and when I asked about getting one of the tables cleaned it was basically a when we get to it you can have it and then they went back to tending the bar.

Great place if you're coming for a few drinks and you can find a table.  But not a place to come specifically for dinner.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Kathryn, thank you so much for all those stars!
reviews_data.review_text: The food was delicious! We got a flatbread, sandwich, and the pork rinds. It was a great Saturday lunch location!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey David thank you for all those stars. Look forward to seeing you again soon
reviews_data.review_text: Food was so fresh and good!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Demi, we are so glad you enjoyed your visit. Can't wait to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: I was hesitant to come considering I am not a beer drinker but my boyfriend really wanted to try it out and the good reviews about the food made me curious so i thought why not. We started with apps and drinks. we ordered the salmon smoked dip 10/10 When i mentioned to our server i wasn’t much a beer drinker and almost passed it up, she asked me what i normally drink (juan collins) so she suggested a stone lager. wow! i was shocked how much i actually enjoyed it! the food was out of the world. I got the pork and peach melt and my boyfriend got the italian flatbread. came out fast, fresh, and piping hot. prices are great!!! Krysti did an amazing job and i left feeling like an official beer drinker!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Nicolas, thanks for all those stars. Look forward to seeing you again.
reviews_data.review_text: Pour Market has really done something good with the space left behind by Middle James. The food is good and reasonably priced. The beer selection is great and provides something for everyone. They kept the best parts of the old brewery and enhanced it on many levels.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Kimberly thank you for all those stars. Look forward to seeing you again
reviews_data.review_text: Good beer and food selection at very reasonable prices. Nice cozy atmosphere. I’ll frequent this place!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for all those stars. Glad you had a great time with us.
reviews_data.review_text: Stopped by here on the way home after the holidays.  Awesome building with lots of natural light and exposed brick.  Plenty of great choices on the menu, I had the Antonio which was delicious and filling.  The staff was friendly and welcoming. My parents live near by so this will be our new go to spot to have a drink and bite to eat when Im in town.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Taylor thanks for the great review. Look forward to seeing you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: We heard about this new place from a friend and decided to stop by after spending Christmas with family in Rock Hill. I got the Rosetta sandwich which was delicious and my husband got a nitro cold brew on tap for the road. Great space and atmosphere with local market goodies as well. The owner also spoke with us for awhile and was very friendly and knowledgeable. Will definitely be back and letting our friends know to check it out soon!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hello Mike, I am so sorry this happened. I tried to catch all the guests with a gift card that wanted to come visit us tonight. I must of missed you. Please send me a quick email with your email and I’ll send one over. Again I am so sorry. 
Sharyn.knight@thepourmarket.com
reviews_data.review_text: We just parked on the 3rd floor of the garage and walked over only to be turned away because we didn't buy a ticket to a comedy show.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Ashley thanks for the all those stars. Thanks for stopping by, can't wait to see you again.

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free parking garage

reviews_data.review_text: Amazing new place near the Rock Hill Sports Complex in a great ‘old warehouse’ type building. Food was amazing and excellent beer selection. Outdoor patio and great service! Perfect for date night or meal with the family. Highly recommend!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Emma for the great review! We look forward to seeing you soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Tried this place from DoorDash tonight and we cannot wait to visit in person soon. We got the mozzarella logs, the muffaletta sandwich with Brussels, and the Caprese sandwich with sweet potato chips. Based on these, I have a feeling this is the type of restaurant you can’t go wrong - just order what looks best to you. The sweet potato chips were seasoned so well & the focaccia bread on the Sammies was spectacular. So good can’t wait to try it hot 😂

reviews_data.owner_answer: Rob!  Thank you so much for the kind words. We are so glad you enjoyed your time with us.
reviews_data.review_text:
Our Airbnb host provided a cool little welcome folder that included places close by that could walked to for food and we decided to give The Pour Market a try.

The place is set up pretty nicely and was very clean with an industrial chic look. We could either sit at the bar or a table and we chose the bar. Our bartender was attentive and polite.

We started with drinks - she had a pear cider that she enjoyed and I went with a Snafu Garnet and Black Cherry  (had to rep Chucktown while visiting Rock Hill). Both were delicious. I then finished with a draft of Keepsake Brewery’s Little Helper, which is a tasty bright and hoppy pale ale with hints of citrus (shout out to a Gastonia brewery) that was quite delicious.

For food we started with homemade Mazzologs and they didn’t disappoint. Four house made mozzarella sticks that were quite large and crisped to perfection with marinara sauce for dipping. Quite cheesy and even better tasting. These are not your usual mozzarella cheese sticks found in a bar, trust me.

We both decided on pub style sandwiches. She had the Southern Stack, which was their cool rendition of a BLT with smoky bacon, thick cut fried green tomatoes, arugula, and this really delicious mustard remoulade. I had their version of the Philly with caramelized onion and white American  cheese. For our sides, we both had the house made Russet chips (there is a sweet potato option as well). Both were very good and didn’t last long.

We had a chance to speak with the owner and he has quite a vision for this place that we hope takes off. This is a cool little gem in a growing part of Rock Hill and we hope more and more people continue to find it. It’s well worth the trip and you will not be disappointed.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Matthew. Thank you for the great review. Can't wait to see you again soon
reviews_data.review_text: Awesome food and service. Everything we ordered was delicious and arrived quickly. Nice selection of beer and wine as well!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Laura thank you for all those stars! Look forward to having you back in soon.
reviews_data.review_text: The food was amazing! I loved the giant soft pretzel and homemade sweet potato chips! The atmosphere is really cool and it is in a great location!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Robert for all those stars! Look forward to serving you again soon.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: We went for lunch the first week they opened and it did not disappoint.  I had the Antonio and Brussel Sprouts both were fantastic.  Looking forward to trying some other menu items.  Good beer selection.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Molly for all those stars. We can’t wait to see back in again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Great new place in Rock Hill.  Food is excellent and staff is very friendly

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Lisa thank you for all the stars! See you again soon
reviews_data.review_text: Great food, great atmosphere and great staff!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Ed for the five stars.
reviews_data.review_text: The craft selections & ambiance are wonderful!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks guys for all those stars.
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing food and service. They make all the bread in house and the atmosphere is so cozy! So happy to have them here in Rock Hill

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Devin for your kind words. Can’t wait to see you again soon.

reviews_data.review_text: The pour market is a great addition to the university center. Think grapevine with a kitchen. The owners here are great. Seems like a great place with great things to come.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Aaron! So glad you enjoyed everything can’t wait to see you again soon.
reviews_data.review_text: Great atmosphere, great food, really recommend the blue cheese crisps!

The hostess from the "greatest Rugdy nation in the world" was a delight and super attentive. We were looking at the menu to decide what we were going to eat the next time we come.

reviews_data.review_text: The owners did a great job with the space! Awesome menu, cold beer, great service. The pork rinds and mozzalogs are amazing. If you’re in the area, come check out the Pour Market!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Trevor, Sorry for the experience you had, would love to  hear more on how we can get better. Please reach out to us at connect@thepourmarket.com
reviews_data.review_text:
Nice spot in Ft Mill… went in on a Saturday night for food and beers. Good selection of tap beers, pretty limited menu.

So there is no actual “service” in this place. You scan the qr code at your table and order on the toast app, and then they bring you stuff. Just, “here ya go” and that’s it. No asking if everything is ok, etc. We ordered beers and a couple flatbreads. Flatbreads were ok-ish. We had to get our own silverware and share plates. As we talked and munched we slowly decided what we’d order next but then the app was giving errors on trying to order more food. It was 9:02pm.  Got up and asked the bar - kitchen closed.  Had to leave and go somewhere else.

As in all things, communication is key. Would have been nice to know when the kitchen was closing.  Wouldn’t have expected a closed kitchen at 9pm on a Saturday night.

If they actually served their customers the place could be pretty cool.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Oh WOW Shawn, thank you for an amazing review. We are so glad you enjoyed your lunch with us. We look forward to serving you again soon.

reviews_data.review_text: I'm so glad a friend of mine posted this on Facebook because I would have not known it was there. This place was previously Middle James Brewing. It still has the brewery feel but has an awesome menu. I went at lunchtime! The focaccia caprese sandwich was fantastic. And that's coming from a New Yorker who has had some really good focaccia sandwiches! The focaccia is made in house and was delicious! I chose the sweet potato crisps which is a very very thinly sliced chip and I have never had sweet potato chips like that. They were so thin they melted in your mouth. Loved them! My employer got the peach jam and gruyere pork sandwich. The pork is basically bacon but it's more like pork belly bacon, very meaty and it had a smokey type flavor to it. It was very tasty, it had so many different flavors going on. He got their brussel sprouts as a side and I did taste those and they were delicious as well. I will definitely be back because there were plenty of other items on the menu that I am eager to try. I highly recommend this place. I also saw little posters in the bathroom advertising game nights, live music, football watch parties and drink specials etc...So be sure to follow them on social media to stay up to date with their events.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Katheryn! We really appreciate all the kind words.
reviews_data.review_text: Our first time at the Pour Market and definitely not our last. Our group of six meets at local restaurants each week and have sampled many wonderful meals. The food and service at the Pour Market ranks up there with some of our favorites. They make their own focaccia bread which takes their sandwiches over the top.  The sides are outstanding. The service was excellent (thank you Christy!) and the owner, Phil , checked in make sure we enjoyed the food. (We did!) Put this place on your radar! You won't regret it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Peggy, Thank you for great review and glad we were able to give you guys a great birthday celebration. See you again soon.

reviews_data.review_text: My husband and I ate there for my his birthday. They had his favorite beer, Legions Juicy Jay. I had a Birdsong Jalapeno Beer. Our waitress, Nikki was delightful and did a great job explaining the menu. My husband went with the muffeletta sandwich with a side of the potato crisps. If you have not tried the potatoes crisps, well you are missing out. OMG, yummy! I ordered the Pesto Flatbread w/chicken. The flatbread pizza will keep me going back. The food was delicious and a great selection of beer and wine. We can't wait to go back when the pull-up garage doors are open and the fire pit is on. What a great location for the college kids at Winthrop in Rockhill. A fun hangout.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Neil for the great review.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Ian, we are truly sorry for your experience, that is not what we strive for. We would like to make it up to you can you reach out to us at connect@thepourmarket.com.
reviews_data.review_text:
This is a place that maybe has some potential if you combine the inside and outside areas as a good hang out spot, but I wouldn't recommend it as a dinner spot, the food is okay but the staff of 2 wasn't bussing tables and there aren't alot of sit down tables to begin with.  I asked about getting a table cleaned off and waited 5 to 10 minutes and instead snagged a high top table that a couple vacated after just having drinks.

Atmosphere was definitely the best aspect if the Pour Market.  There was a live musician playing and he was good with good music at a good volume for how small it is in there.  The decor is really nice too, classic industrial with a nice little bar and a few tvs.  There is an outdoor area around a big gas firepit that looked really nice but it was cold out so I didn't see it up close.

Food was overall not bad, the flatbreads and Italian Salad were pretty good but they had no Italian dressing.  The pork rind appetizer was decent but you don't get much beer cheese dip with it.  The grilled pimento cheese sandwich was a miss, my wife who likes pimento cheese had to end up scraping off the cheese and just ate some if the bread.

For the bar section, the beer selection was good.  They serve a lot of wines as well, not sure about the liquor selection if any though...my back was to the bar so I didn't see.

The service was the main issue, I'm sure the staff of 2 was probably overwhelmed a bit but if you want bus the tables you have no place for people to sit and when I asked about getting one of the tables cleaned it was basically a when we get to it you can have it and then they went back to tending the bar.

Great place if you're coming for a few drinks and you can find a table.  But not a place to come specifically for dinner.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hey Kathryn, thank you so much for all those stars!
reviews_data.review_text: The food was delicious! We got a flatbread, sandwich, and the pork rinds. It was a great Saturday lunch location!

reviews_data.review_text: I was hesitant to come considering I am not a beer drinker but my boyfriend really wanted to try it out and the good reviews about the food made me curious so i thought why not. We started with apps and drinks. we ordered the salmon smoked dip 10/10 When i mentioned to our server i wasn’t much a beer drinker and almost passed it up, she asked me what i normally drink (juan collins) so she suggested a stone lager. wow! i was shocked how much i actually enjoyed it! the food was out of the world. I got the pork and peach melt and my boyfriend got the italian flatbread. came out fast, fresh, and piping hot. prices are great!!! Krysti did an amazing job and i left feeling like an official beer drinker!!

reviews_data.review_text: Pour Market has really done something good with the space left behind by Middle James. The food is good and reasonably priced. The beer selection is great and provides something for everyone. They kept the best parts of the old brewery and enhanced it on many levels.

reviews_data.review_text: Stopped by here on the way home after the holidays.  Awesome building with lots of natural light and exposed brick.  Plenty of great choices on the menu, I had the Antonio which was delicious and filling.  The staff was friendly and welcoming. My parents live near by so this will be our new go to spot to have a drink and bite to eat when Im in town.

reviews_data.review_text: We heard about this new place from a friend and decided to stop by after spending Christmas with family in Rock Hill. I got the Rosetta sandwich which was delicious and my husband got a nitro cold brew on tap for the road. Great space and atmosphere with local market goodies as well. The owner also spoke with us for awhile and was very friendly and knowledgeable. Will definitely be back and letting our friends know to check it out soon!

reviews_data.review_text: Amazing new place near the Rock Hill Sports Complex in a great ‘old warehouse’ type building. Food was amazing and excellent beer selection. Outdoor patio and great service! Perfect for date night or meal with the family. Highly recommend!!!

reviews_data.review_text: Tried this place from DoorDash tonight and we cannot wait to visit in person soon. We got the mozzarella logs, the muffaletta sandwich with Brussels, and the Caprese sandwich with sweet potato chips. Based on these, I have a feeling this is the type of restaurant you can’t go wrong - just order what looks best to you. The sweet potato chips were seasoned so well & the focaccia bread on the Sammies was spectacular. So good can’t wait to try it hot 😂

reviews_data.owner_answer: Rob!  Thank you so much for the kind words. We are so glad you enjoyed your time with us.
reviews_data.review_text:
Our Airbnb host provided a cool little welcome folder that included places close by that could walked to for food and we decided to give The Pour Market a try.

The place is set up pretty nicely and was very clean with an industrial chic look. We could either sit at the bar or a table and we chose the bar. Our bartender was attentive and polite.

We started with drinks - she had a pear cider that she enjoyed and I went with a Snafu Garnet and Black Cherry  (had to rep Chucktown while visiting Rock Hill). Both were delicious. I then finished with a draft of Keepsake Brewery’s Little Helper, which is a tasty bright and hoppy pale ale with hints of citrus (shout out to a Gastonia brewery) that was quite delicious.

For food we started with homemade Mazzologs and they didn’t disappoint. Four house made mozzarella sticks that were quite large and crisped to perfection with marinara sauce for dipping. Quite cheesy and even better tasting. These are not your usual mozzarella cheese sticks found in a bar, trust me.

We both decided on pub style sandwiches. She had the Southern Stack, which was their cool rendition of a BLT with smoky bacon, thick cut fried green tomatoes, arugula, and this really delicious mustard remoulade. I had their version of the Philly with caramelized onion and white American  cheese. For our sides, we both had the house made Russet chips (there is a sweet potato option as well). Both were very good and didn’t last long.

We had a chance to speak with the owner and he has quite a vision for this place that we hope takes off. This is a cool little gem in a growing part of Rock Hill and we hope more and more people continue to find it. It’s well worth the trip and you will not be disappointed.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hello Matthew. Thank you for the great review. Can't wait to see you again soon
reviews_data.review_text: Awesome food and service. Everything we ordered was delicious and arrived quickly. Nice selection of beer and wine as well!
